memory:memory/2026-05-21-1730.md:134:171.snippet: ou_209be8a3163e48e74ba164fb84995baa: ![image] 把这图里的日报表优化一下，发给我 Description: This daily report for the Yinchuan Kaiqi Group tracks New Media and Vertical Media (垂媒) performance. **Key Insights:** 1. **Targets:** New Media lead acquisition (1959) missed the group target of 2460. 2. **Quality vs. Quantity:** Vertical Media generated more total transactions (27) than New Media (21), despite having nearly 50% fewer leads, indicating higher lead quality. 3. **Branch Leaders:** Yinchuan Kaiqi is the main driver, contributing 26 of the 27 total sales in Vertical Media. 4. **Ef assistant: 看到了！这张图展示的是**达成看板**的完整日报，格式比之前那个精美多了——有色块、KPI圆点、趋势箭头等。 我来按这个样式重新优化一版PDF发给您 🦞 assistant: 优化版PDF已生成 🦞 MEDIA:G
